en: It's a beautiful day in Abacadef, and the Silly Crocodile just woke up from a good night of sleep.
Ahhhh! What are you going to do today, Silly Crocodile?
Uh, I'm going to get some breakfast. Eat breakfast? Yeah, that's a great idea.
So off he went to find himself some breakfast.
In the wonderful woods of Abacadef, there were many great foods for the Silly Crocodile to eat.
There were spicy banana mushrooms, salty pink apples, stinky polka dot peaches,
something stuffed in a muffin, and lots of funny honey in case your nose gets runny.
Hehe, funny honey. But there were other foods, too, that weren't so healthy,
like chocolate bars, potato chips, and fuzzy suckers.
I'm so hungry, I could eat everything!
Whoa, whoa, hang on, Silly Crocodile.
Before you start eating everything, you might want to think about what you're eating.
Nah, I'm just going to eat. Well, okay then.
Just remember what I told you about unhealthy foods. Okay.
So then the Silly Crocodile started to eat. Aha!
First he started with one salty pink apple.
Huh? I grew!
You did just grow! Healthy foods make you grow!
Yeah, chocolate bars! Then the Silly Crocodile tried unhealthy food.
The chocolate bar he had tasted really sweet, but it didn't make him grow.
So he tried something else.
A spicy banana mushroom!
These are very healthy to eat, but don't always taste the best.
That's spicy! The spicy food made his nose runny, so then he had some funny honey.
Oh yeah, funny honey! In case your nose is runny!
That's much better! And again he grew!
Then he tried a stinky polka dot peach.
The smell wasn't the best, but he ate it anyway.
Wow, that was delicious! Then suddenly he had an idea.
It's a great idea! I know what happens when the Silly Crocodile gets ideas.
Getting bigger!
Now I'm a big Silly Crocodile! Hahaha!
What's wrong, Silly Crocodile? You got what you wanted, but you don't look so good.
Are you okay? I don't feel good.
Eating healthy food is a good thing to do, but eating too much food can be unhealthy too.
I'll be back. I took a potty. And so the Silly Crocodile, who was once a giant crocodile,
returned back to normal size after feeding all of the plants in the woods.
Yeah, I'm better. Sometimes our bodies take a long time to grow,
but growing too fast can also make our bodies hurt.
Yeah, real bad.
So the Silly Crocodile took his time growing and enjoyed being the little reptile he was.
And he enjoyed it every bite of the way. The end.
I'm going to eat everything!
Thank you so much for watching.
If you would like to watch more Silly Crocodile videos, just ask for More Silly Crocodile.
Yeah, that's me! Hahaha, you're so silly.
Yeah. Thanks for watching. See you next time.
Bye-bye!
